note: Belt idle, comms OK, no run command
Belt running fwd at speed, current nominal

state_sub: No good tag reads -- PLC / bridge link down.

cards.title: PLC/bridge offline
cards.nextCheck: Check the PLC bridge / Modbus link and that the gateway is polling the device.
cards.askText: The garage conveyor is showing "PLC/bridge offline" (A0_OFFLINE): No fresh PLC data for 9999s (>= 30s). What is the most likely cause and how do I clear it?

cards.title: GS10 RS-485 link down
cards.message: vfd_comm_ok is FALSE - the PLC<->GS10 serial link is down; all VFD values are stale (frozen from the last good poll).
cards.nextCheck: Reseat the RS-485 wiring PLC<->GS10; confirm baud/parity; power-cycle the drive.
cards.askText: The garage conveyor is showing "GS10 RS-485 link down" (A1_COMM_STALE): vfd_comm_ok is FALSE - the PLC<->GS10 serial link is down; all VFD values are stale (frozen from the last good poll). What is the most likely cause and how do I clear it?

cards.title: GS10 drive fault active
cards.message: GS10 reports fault code 21: oL (overload) - the drive has tripped (0x2100 low byte). Clear the cause and reset the drive.
cards.nextCheck: Read the GS10 keypad fault, clear the cause, then reset the drive (STOP+RESET).
cards.askText: The garage conveyor is showing "GS10 drive fault active" (A2_VFD_FAULT): GS10 reports fault code 21: oL (overload) - the drive has tripped (0x2100 low byte). Clear the cause and reset the drive. What is the most likely cause and how do I clear it?

cards.title: E-stop wiring fault
cards.message: Dual-channel e-stop disagreement (DI_02 NC and DI_03 NO read the SAME) or the wiring-fault flag is set - broken/shorted e-stop wire; drive not permitted.
cards.nextCheck: Inspect the dual-channel e-stop loop for a broken/shorted wire (DI_02 vs DI_03).
cards.askText: The garage conveyor is showing "E-stop wiring fault" (A3_ESTOP_WIRING): Dual-channel e-stop disagreement (DI_02 NC and DI_03 NO read the SAME) or the wiring-fault flag is set - broken/shorted e-stop wire; drive not permitted. What is the most likely cause and how do I clear it?

cards.title: Direction fault
cards.message: FWD (DI_00) and REV (DI_01) are both commanded - the PLC commands STOP.
cards.nextCheck: Check the FWD/REV selector wiring -- both directions are commanded at once.
cards.askText: The garage conveyor is showing "Direction fault" (A4_DIRECTION_FAULT): FWD (DI_00) and REV (DI_01) are both commanded - the PLC commands STOP. What is the most likely cause and how do I clear it?

cards.title: Belt running while not permitted
cards.message: Motor reports RUNNING but it should not be: e-stop active.
cards.nextCheck: Verify the safety interlock chain; the belt should not run while not permitted.
cards.askText: The garage conveyor is showing "Belt running while not permitted" (A5_ILLEGAL_RUN): Motor reports RUNNING but it should not be: e-stop active. What is the most likely cause and how do I clear it?

note: Commanded RUN 4s but motor not running

cards.title: Drive not responding to RUN
cards.message: Command word is RUN (18) for 4s but the motor is not running.
cards.nextCheck: Confirm the GS10 is in remote/RUN-enabled mode and not faulted/locked.
cards.askText: The garage conveyor is showing "Drive not responding to RUN" (A6_DRIVE_NOT_RESPONDING): Command word is RUN (18) for 4s but the motor is not running. What is the most likely cause and how do I clear it?

note: Commanded 30 Hz, output stuck at 10 Hz

cards.title: Drive not responding to RUN
cards.message: Command word is RUN (18) for 6s but the motor is not running.
cards.nextCheck: Confirm the GS10 is in remote/RUN-enabled mode and not faulted/locked.
cards.askText: The garage conveyor is showing "Drive not responding to RUN" (A6_DRIVE_NOT_RESPONDING): Command word is RUN (18) for 6s but the motor is not running. What is the most likely cause and how do I clear it?

cards.title: Output Hz not tracking setpoint
cards.message: Commanded 30.0 Hz but output is 10.0 Hz (off by 20.0 Hz > 3.0) for 6s - drive not reaching commanded speed (mechanical drag, current-limit, or load).
cards.nextCheck: Check for mechanical drag, a current-limit, or load -- drive can't hold speed.
cards.askText: The garage conveyor is showing "Output Hz not tracking setpoint" (A7_FREQ_NOT_TRACKING): Commanded 30.0 Hz but output is 10.0 Hz (off by 20.0 Hz > 3.0) for 6s - drive not reaching commanded speed (mechanical drag, current-limit, or load). What is the most likely cause and how do I clear it?

note: Output 7.0 A over motor FLA 5.0 A (jam)

cards.title: VFD output over motor FLA
cards.message: Output current 7.00 A exceeds motor FLA 5.00 A - possible overload/jam (cf. GS10 oL fault 21).
cards.nextCheck: Inspect the belt/rollers for a jam or binding; compare current to motor FLA.
cards.askText: The garage conveyor is showing "VFD output over motor FLA" (A8_OVERCURRENT): Output current 7.00 A exceeds motor FLA 5.00 A - possible overload/jam (cf. GS10 oL fault 21). What is the most likely cause and how do I clear it?

note: DC bus 230 V below 250 V floor
state_sub: DC bus voltage out of range

cards.title: DC bus voltage out of range
cards.message: DC bus 230 V is outside [250, 410] V (nominal ~327 V; low -> GS10 Lvd 12).
cards.nextCheck: Check incoming supply voltage and the GS10 DC-bus (low->Lvd, high->ovd).
cards.askText: The garage conveyor is showing "DC bus voltage out of range" (A9_DC_BUS): DC bus 230 V is outside [250, 410] V (nominal ~327 V; low -> GS10 Lvd 12). What is the most likely cause and how do I clear it?

cards.title: Drive not responding to RUN
cards.message: Command word is RUN (18) for 6s but the motor is not running.
cards.nextCheck: Confirm the GS10 is in remote/RUN-enabled mode and not faulted/locked.
cards.askText: The garage conveyor is showing "Drive not responding to RUN" (A6_DRIVE_NOT_RESPONDING): Command word is RUN (18) for 6s but the motor is not running. What is the most likely cause and how do I clear it?

cards.title: Output frequency stuck at zero
cards.message: Commanded RUN for 6s but output Hz is still 0 - the drive is not following the run command.
cards.nextCheck: Drive commanded RUN but 0 Hz out -- check enable, fault latch, output wiring.
cards.askText: The garage conveyor is showing "Output frequency stuck at zero" (A10_FREQ_STUCK_ZERO): Commanded RUN for 6s but output Hz is still 0 - the drive is not following the run command. What is the most likely cause and how do I clear it?

cards.title: Photo-eye soft-stop (jam/blockage)
cards.message: Photo-eye DI_05 latched a soft-stop - an object is blocking the infeed beam (jam/backup); the belt is held stopped until Start re-arms it.
cards.nextCheck: Clear the object blocking the infeed photo-eye (DI_05), then re-arm with Start.
cards.askText: The garage conveyor is showing "Photo-eye soft-stop (jam/blockage)" (A12_PHOTOEYE_JAM): Photo-eye DI_05 latched a soft-stop - an object is blocking the infeed beam (jam/backup); the belt is held stopped until Start re-arms it. What is the most likely cause and how do I clear it?
